event.name: Fiji Surf Pro
event.cover_sub: My top 4 women to make the final at Cloudbreak - one of the best lefthanders on the planet. Down-the-line wave riding, big scores, no room for error.

picks.name: Jessica Crisp
picks.why: The {{2022 Aloha Classic champion}} - and that's just one line on a stacked CV. Tough call to leave her in 4th.

picks.name: Maria Andres
picks.why: 5th here in Fiji last time out, and 4th at Margaret River this year - {{right behind our top two}}.

picks.name: Sarah Kenyon
picks.why: {{Beat Jane Seman}} in the Margaret River final earlier this year - arrives with the upper hand.

picks.label: Pick to Win
picks.name: Jane Seman
picks.why: If Cloudbreak turns on big - and it looks like it will - we don't see {{anyone getting close}}. Out to level the score with Sarah after Margaret River.
